title: The One After 'I Do'

jokes.text: Is that why you had to get married?
jokes.setup: Character hears Monica is pregnant and sees she just got married
jokes.punchline: Assumes it's a shotgun wedding due to pregnancy
jokes.explanation: Standard awkward assumption joke. Well-structured but predictable.

jokes.text: Ah, slow swimmers?
jokes.setup: Monica denies being pregnant
jokes.punchline: Implies Chandler's sperm aren't effective
jokes.explanation: Clever euphemism delivered with perfect economy. Good wordplay.

jokes.text: Find anything that doesn't say, 'I died tragically in France.'
jokes.setup: Character needs to change out of wedding attire
jokes.punchline: The clothing makes them look like a dead soldier
jokes.explanation: Vivid, specific visual description that's both funny and quotable.

jokes.text: ...it's because I am.
jokes.setup: Monica denies being pregnant, referencing pregnancy test in trash
jokes.punchline: Plot twist reveals Phoebe is actually pregnant
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection with perfect timing. Strong plot revelation.

jokes.text: I didn't say anything because it's your day.
jokes.setup: Phoebe reveals pregnancy at Monica's wedding
jokes.punchline: Claims she didn't want to steal the spotlight while literally stealing it
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe logic - well-intentioned but completely oblivious.

jokes.text: I can't say because he's famous.
jokes.setup: Asked who the father is
jokes.punchline: Claims it's someone famous, adding mystique
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe grandiosity - making her situation sound more dramatic.

jokes.text: Okay. It's James Brolin.
jokes.setup: Everyone pressures her to reveal the famous father
jokes.punchline: Names a random, unlikely celebrity
jokes.explanation: Unexpected choice of celebrity makes it funnier than obvious picks.

jokes.text: What? He never said that to me.
jokes.setup: Learning James Brolin is married to Barbra Streisand
jokes.punchline: Phoebe acts genuinely surprised and betrayed
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe moment - staying committed to the bit with genuine emotion.

jokes.text: I could only think of two names: him and Ed Begley Jr.
jokes.setup: Explaining choice of James Brolin
jokes.punchline: Her entire pool of famous men was these two random actors
jokes.explanation: Ed Begley Jr. is an inspired random choice that feels authentically Phoebe.

jokes.text: Ed Begley Jr. is not gay.
jokes.setup: Phoebe explains she ruled out Ed Begley Jr. because he's gay
jokes.punchline: Someone corrects her incorrect assumption
jokes.explanation: Simple correction that adds to Phoebe's confused logic.

jokes.text: I won't put my hand in your pocket.
jokes.setup: Chandler says he has a present
jokes.punchline: Monica assumes it's something inappropriate in his pocket
jokes.explanation: Solid setup for sexual misdirection, well-executed but predictable.

jokes.text: Not well.
jokes.setup: Monica asks if he'll be able to dance despite slippery shoes
jokes.punchline: Chandler's brutally honest assessment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler deadpan delivery with maximum economy.

jokes.text: Good news! I don't think anyone's looking.
jokes.setup: Chandler struggling with dancing
jokes.punchline: Silver lining is their embarrassment is going unnoticed
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy setup with Chandler's optimistic spin.

jokes.text: That's fair. Is it Tag?
jokes.setup: Rachel says she won't reveal father until she tells him
jokes.punchline: Monica immediately starts guessing anyway
jokes.explanation: Perfect Monica behavior - agreeing then immediately violating the agreement.

jokes.text: At least we know it's a him.
jokes.setup: Rachel says she won't tell until she tells 'him'
jokes.punchline: Monica finds the one detail she can extract from that
jokes.explanation: Classic Monica - finding any angle to gather information.

jokes.text: What's more important? My clothes, or being here today?
jokes.setup: Joey appears in ridiculous military outfit
jokes.punchline: He frames his terrible fashion choice as a noble sacrifice
jokes.explanation: Good visual callback with Joey's typical self-justification.

jokes.text: I'm not even going to pretend to be listening.
jokes.setup: Joey's dramatic explanation about his outfit choice
jokes.punchline: Chandler's brutal honesty about not caring
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler line - deadpan and cutting with great economy.

jokes.text: Mona...Klegglachen? The famous botanist.
jokes.setup: Ross trying to compliment the name Mona
jokes.punchline: Makes up a ridiculous fake famous person
jokes.explanation: Classic Ross overthinking - the made-up name 'Klegglachen' is inspired.

jokes.text: But she was once the hottie of the plant world.
jokes.setup: Ross elaborating on fake botanist Mona Klegglachen
jokes.punchline: Describes her as sexually appealing in botany context
jokes.explanation: 'Hottie of the plant world' is brilliantly specific and perfectly Ross-like.

jokes.text: So, what table are you at? Me too.
jokes.setup: Ross trying to sit with Mona
jokes.punchline: He lies about his table assignment to be near her
jokes.explanation: Standard 'guy lying to impress girl' setup, but executed smoothly.

jokes.text: This time, really put your ass into it.
jokes.setup: Dance instruction scene
jokes.punchline: Crude but literal instruction about dancing
jokes.explanation: Low-hanging fruit humor, but contextually appropriate for dance scene.

jokes.text: Bravo, Dennis, thanks for pleasing my mother so.
jokes.setup: Learning Dennis is his mother's 'fantastic lover'
jokes.punchline: Chandler's awkward, formal acknowledgment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler discomfort response - formal language for inappropriate situation.

jokes.text: Funny 'ha-ha,' or funny--?
jokes.setup: Someone says meeting Dennis is 'a funny story'
jokes.punchline: Asking for clarification on what type of funny
jokes.explanation: Standard 'funny peculiar vs funny haha' setup but well-timed.

jokes.text: When you showed it to me, you held it that way...which was misleading.
jokes.setup: Ross explaining why he's at wrong table
jokes.punchline: Blames the way someone held the table number
jokes.explanation: Classic Ross - over-explaining and deflecting blame for his confusion.

jokes.text: Okay, fine, I'm a 7!
jokes.setup: Chandler claims size 11 feet, gets called out
jokes.punchline: Admits to dramatically smaller shoe size
jokes.explanation: Good escalation from lie to desperate confession about insecurity.

jokes.text: All right, I have small feet. But the rest of me is good!
jokes.setup: Chandler's defensive about small feet
jokes.punchline: Desperate attempt to salvage his masculinity
jokes.explanation: Good continuation of the insecurity thread with defensive humor.

jokes.text: In this day and age, how dumb do you have to be to get pregnant?
jokes.setup: Monica commenting on Phoebe's pregnancy
jokes.punchline: Unknowingly insulting Rachel who is also pregnant
jokes.explanation: Good dramatic irony - audience knows Rachel is pregnant but Monica doesn't.

jokes.text: I don't know, maybe they have tools.
jokes.setup: Discussion of how sperm can get through despite protection
jokes.punchline: Imagining sperm as equipped with implements
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd image of sperm with tools. Creative and perfectly delivered.

jokes.text: Does she realize she's not gonna have a date for the next 18 years?
jokes.setup: Discussing challenges of single motherhood
jokes.punchline: Brutally pessimistic view of dating prospects
jokes.explanation: Dark but realistic observation, well within Monica's character range.

jokes.text: That's how the French drink it.
jokes.setup: Someone spills or mishandles champagne
jokes.punchline: Pretends it was intentional and sophisticated
jokes.explanation: Standard 'cover for mistake' joke with slight cultural twist.

jokes.text: And he said he'd leave her for me. So I said, 'Are you sure?'
jokes.setup: Phoebe continuing James Brolin fantasy
jokes.punchline: She's being considerate about breaking up his marriage
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe - even in fantasy, she's considerate of others' feelings.

jokes.text: How many ways are there?
jokes.setup: Questioned about peeing on pregnancy test correctly
jokes.punchline: Incredulous at the suggestion of multiple techniques
jokes.explanation: Good reaction to absurd suggestion with perfect comedic timing.

jokes.text: This is why you register.
jokes.setup: Discussion about giving appropriate gifts
jokes.punchline: Wedding registries prevent awkward gift situations
jokes.explanation: Smart observational humor about wedding culture and gift-giving.

jokes.text: Dr. Geller? I wasn't farting!
jokes.setup: Ross makes embarrassing noise while trying to look dignified
jokes.punchline: Defensive overexplanation draws more attention
jokes.explanation: Classic Ross overthinking - making situation worse by addressing it.

jokes.text: Hop on.
jokes.setup: Ross offers special dancing where woman stands on his feet
jokes.punchline: Awkward invitation to physical contact
jokes.explanation: Sets up physical comedy sequence, economical but simple setup.

jokes.text: You are a soap actor with freakishly tiny feet.
jokes.setup: Joey worried about being seen as 'just a soap actor'
jokes.punchline: Brutal assessment combining both insecurities
jokes.explanation: Good callback that combines multiple character insecurities effectively.

jokes.text: I am so gonna score!
jokes.setup: Character watching Ross's dancing technique with women
jokes.punchline: Misunderstanding the innocent nature of the foot dancing
jokes.explanation: Simple misunderstanding humor, functional but not particularly clever.

jokes.text: A friend who can speak in many dialects...has training in stage combat and is willing to do partial nudity.
jokes.setup: Joey giving wedding toast about friendship
jokes.punchline: Turns into audition pitch for Broadway show
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey moment - hijacking wedding toast for career opportunities. Great structure.

jokes.text: Maybe I should stand on your feet!
jokes.setup: Ross struggling to dance with heavy woman on his feet
jokes.punchline: She suggests reversing the position
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy escalation with logical absurd suggestion.

jokes.text: It's an all-Chinese cast.
jokes.setup: Joey insisting he can do any role
jokes.punchline: Reveals impossible casting requirement
jokes.explanation: Perfect setup/punchline structure deflating Joey's confidence.

jokes.text: You could never embarrass me. Okay, you could easily do that.
jokes.setup: Monica reassuring Chandler about dancing
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicts herself honestly
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection with perfect Monica honesty breaking through attempted diplomacy.

jokes.text: I'm gonna have you arrested. You stole my moves.
jokes.setup: Someone copying Ross's dancing style
jokes.punchline: Treating dance moves as intellectual property
jokes.explanation: Decent physical comedy payoff with legal threat humor.

jokes.text: It's negative.
jokes.setup: Tension over pregnancy test results
jokes.punchline: False result that sets up bigger revelation
jokes.explanation: Setup for major misdirection payoff, structurally important moment.

jokes.text: No, it's positive.
jokes.setup: Previous lie about negative test
jokes.punchline: Reveals the truth and Rachel's real feelings
jokes.explanation: Excellent emotional misdirection that reveals character growth and true feelings.

jokes.text: That's a risky little game.
jokes.setup: Learning about the pregnancy test deception
jokes.punchline: Understated assessment of emotional manipulation
jokes.explanation: Good understated reaction to dramatic emotional manipulation.

jokes.text: I feel like I'm holding down the fort all alone.
jokes.setup: Mona commenting on nice guys being rare
jokes.punchline: Sees herself as defending niceness single-handedly
jokes.explanation: Decent character moment establishing Mona's earnest personality.

jokes.text: How small are your feet?
jokes.setup: Learning about Joey's foot size issues
jokes.punchline: Innocent curiosity about the running gag
jokes.explanation: Simple callback to establish running gag across episode.

tmdb_overview: Monica and Chandler's wedding excitement is dampened by pregnancy news. Chandler struggles with dancing in new shoes, while Ross flirts with a wedding guest.
